welcome.subject: Welcome to {{community}}!
welcome.body: Thank you for joining {{community}}. Your account has been created and you can now start exploring the platform.

verification.subject: Verify your email address
verification.body: Please verify your email address by clicking the button below.

password_reset.subject: Reset your password
password_reset.body: You requested a password reset. Click the button below to set a new password.
password_reset.ignore: If you did not request this, you can safely ignore this email.

review_request.subject: Leave a review for {{name}}
review_request.body: You recently exchanged services with {{other_party}}. Please take a moment to leave a review.

common.button_fallback: If the button above doesn't work, copy and paste this link into your browser:
common.button_fallback_short: If the button doesn't work, copy this link:

footer.sent_by: Sent by {{community}} powered by Project NEXUS
footer.member_notice: You received this email because you are a member of the {{community}} community.

job_alert.receiving_notice: You are receiving this because you set up a job alert.

gamification_digest.subject: Your Weekly Progress Digest
gamification_digest.title: Your Weekly Progress
gamification_digest.preview: You earned {{xp}} XP this week on {{community}}
gamification_digest.intro: Here's your weekly progress update from {{community}}.
gamification_digest.encouragement: Keep up the great work — your contributions make the community stronger!

gamification_milestone.level_up_body: Keep contributing to your community to unlock even more achievements.
gamification_milestone.badge_earned_body: Great work contributing to your community!
gamification_milestone.streak_body: Your consistency is inspiring to the whole community. Keep it going!
gamification_milestone.leaderboard_body: Keep it up to maintain your spot at the top.

federation.message_body: You have a new cross-community message from {{sender}} in {{community}}.
federation.transaction_received_body: {{sender}} from {{community}} has sent you a cross-community time credit transfer.
federation.transaction_confirmed_preview: Your transfer of {{amount}} hour(s) to {{recipient}} is confirmed
federation.transaction_confirmed_body: Your cross-community time credit transfer has been processed successfully.
federation.digest_preview: Your weekly federation activity summary for {{community}}
federation.digest_body: Here's your cross-community activity summary for the past week.
federation.digest_quiet: It was a quiet week — no cross-community activity to report.
federation.partnership_preview: {{community}} wants to partner with your community
federation.partnership_body: {{community}} has sent your community a federation partnership request.

newsletter.subscriber_notice: You received this email because you're subscribed to the {{community}} newsletter.

digest.title: Your {{frequency}} Digest
digest.subject: Your {{frequency}} Digest from Project NEXUS
digest.intro: Here is a summary of what you missed on Project NEXUS:
digest.opted_in_notice: You received this email because you opted for a {{frequency}} summary.

weekly_digest.title: Community Pulse - Weekly Digest
weekly_digest.heading: Community Pulse
weekly_digest.preview_text: Your weekly community highlights - new offers, requests, and upcoming events
weekly_digest.intro: Here's what's happening in your community this week.
weekly_digest.opted_in_notice: You received this email because you opted into weekly digests.

match_digest.title: Your {{period}} Match Digest
match_digest.heading: Your {{period}} Digest
match_digest.intro: Here's a summary of your new matches from the past {{period}}. Don't miss out on these opportunities!
match_digest.receiving_digest: You're receiving this {{period}} digest because you have matches enabled.

match_hot.title: Hot Match Found!
match_hot.heading: Hot Match Found!
match_hot.intro: Great news! We found a highly compatible listing that matches your preferences. This is a hot match - don't miss out!
match_hot.receiving_notice: You're receiving this because you enabled hot match notifications.

events.cancelled_body: We're sorry to let you know that the following event has been cancelled:
events.reminder_body: This is a friendly reminder that "{{title}}" {{time_note}}.

match_mutual.title: Mutual Match Found!
match_mutual.preview: Perfect exchange opportunity with {{name}}! You can both help each other - {{score}}% compatibility.
match_mutual.heading: Mutual Match!
match_mutual.intro: We found a mutual exchange opportunity with {{partner}}. You can both help each other - this is a win-win!
match_mutual.rare_notice: Mutual matches are rare! This is a win-win opportunity where both parties benefit from the exchange.
match_mutual.receiving_notice: You're receiving this because you enabled mutual match notifications.
